disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began suddenly about two hours ago, immediately after the patient read a portal notification flagging an abnormal blood protein
trigger_question_examples: What was happening just before the symptoms came on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on out of nowhere about two hours ago, right after I opened my blood results on the portal and saw a flag about an abnormal protein.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest tightness is central, does not radiate, and eases when the patient slows their breathing
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the chest tightness?
Does it spread anywhere, and does anything make it better?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a tight feeling right in the middle of my chest. It doesn't spread to my arm or jaw, and it eases off when I slow my breathing down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing heartbeat and fast breathing (hyperventilation) with lightheadedness, in an agitated patient
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding really fast and I'm breathing quickly — it's making me a bit lightheaded.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absence of alarm features on screening — no deep or dull bone pain, no fractures, no urinary symptoms, no ongoing tiredness, no recurrent infections
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any bone pain, especially in your back or ribs?
Any unusual tiredness, frequent infections, or changes in your urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that — no bone pain or fractures, no water-works problems, I haven't been especially tired and I don't get a lot of infections. I feel physically fine apart from this panic.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The portal result the patient read flagged an abnormal blood protein which they interpreted as being linked to bone cancer
trigger_question_examples: What exactly did the result say?
What are you most worried it means?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The portal said something about an abnormal protein in my blood, and when I searched it online it said it can be linked to bone cancer — that's what set me off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications and no recent anti-inflammatory or analgesic use
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular medications?
Have you taken any painkillers or anti-inflammatories recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any regular tablets, and I haven't taken any painkillers or anti-inflammatories lately.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest tightness and racing heart settle substantially with structured slow breathing and reassurance
trigger_question_examples: Does the tightness settle if you slow your breathing?
How do you feel after a few minutes of calm breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — when I do slow breathing for a few minutes the tightness eases and my heart slows down a lot.
